name: akarelin-skills
description: Personal productivity plugins for Claude Code — agentic cognition, file organization, workplace tools, and administration.

plugins.name: ac
plugins.description: Agentic Cognition — foundational tools: memory (get/set/save), search-knowledge (scoped), sessions, skills, agents, learning.

plugins.name: organize
plugins.description: File organizer with sub-skills: arxiv paper organizer, scan processors (medical-to-Obsidian).

plugins.name: work
plugins.description: Workplace tools: M365 (Mail, Calendar, Teams, Files, Tasks), Google (Gmail, Drive), Slack (MCP), Atlassian (Jira/Confluence MCP).

plugins.name: manage
plugins.description: M365 tenant administration: Users, Groups, Teams, Licenses, Audit, Security.
